title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page. The page times out after 30 seconds with a 504 gateway error. Affecting all browsers.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Checkout process fails at payment step. Stripe integration returns a timeout error after card details are submitted. Only on mobile devices.

title: Export to CSV broken
description: The export button on the reports page downloads an empty CSV file. Data is visible in the UI but not written to the file output.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: Users stopped receiving order confirmation emails since March 1st. SMTP logs show messages queued but never dispatched.

title: Dashboard charts not rendering
description: Analytics dashboard shows blank chart areas. Console error: 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading map)'. Happened after latest deploy.

title: Profile picture upload fails
description: Uploading a profile image returns a 413 error. Files under 1MB also fail. Issue started after server migration on Feb 28th.

title: Search results showing duplicates
description: Product search returns duplicate entries for the same item. Appears to be a pagination bug where page 1 results repeat on page 2.

title: Two-factor auth code rejected
description: Several users report that valid 2FA codes are being rejected on login. Time-sync issue suspected on the authentication server.

title: Invoice PDF formatting broken
description: Generated invoice PDFs have misaligned columns and missing company logo. Issue only on invoices created after March 2nd.

title: Dark mode toggle not saving
description: User preference for dark mode resets to light mode on page refresh. LocalStorage key is being written but not read correctly on load.

title: API rate limit error on bulk import
description: Bulk contact import triggers 429 rate limit errors midway. The import tool does not implement request throttling or retry logic.

title: Mobile menu overlapping content
description: On screens below 375px, the hamburger navigation menu opens and overlaps page content without a backdrop or close button.

title: Password reset link expired instantly
description: Reset password emails are sent but the link expires immediately. Token TTL was accidentally set to 0 seconds in the last config push.

title: Timezone mismatch in scheduling
description: Scheduled reports are delivered 5 hours late for users in GMT+5 regions. Server time is used instead of the user's profile timezone.

title: Webhook signature validation failing
description: Third-party webhooks are rejected despite correct HMAC signatures. The validation function was trimming trailing newlines from the payload.
